meaning: n.排水沟,消耗,排水vt.排出沟外,喝干,耗尽vi.排水,流干
examples: The water swirled down the drain.
She tipped the dirty water down the drain.
The Android app was upgraded to, among other things, put less drain on battery life.
Remember when the Christmas season meant more than just crowds, traffic, and a massive drain on your wallet?
